states.name: Ossia
states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
"Specimen name: O55-1A
Status: Stable

Specimen took her first non-assisted steps this morning. Her language capability far outpaces her physical development: she repeatedly asked for aid walking around the laboratory, and stumbled more than once. Still, this represents significant progress on her part. The faster she achieves full maturity, the better.

I've gotten word from associates on the mainland that the Aeon Lords have been sighted once again. No news on whether it has officially begun, but I fear I am running out of time. I have only just produced a living homunculus. How will she take to her powers when she finally discovers them?

I can only pray for good fortune. A thing I must do far too often, for a scientist."

states.name: Ossia
states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
"Specimen Name: O55-1A
Status: Critical

Another blackout today. The specimen asked, as she often does, for a chance to venture outside the laboratory. I denied her and gave the usual reasons when asked why, but upon hearing them, her mana levels spiked. She broke a quarter of the equipment in her room before her power finally overcame her. I have dosed her with a memory poultice again. Let us pray that it continues to work.

I am starting to regret this iteration of the experiment. The specimen possesses immense strength, but cannot control her emotions. Integrating her into the Pandemonic system is crucial, but doing so in this state might spell doom for us all."

states.name: Ossia
states.title: The Hollow Heart
states.description:
No one knows what made the Tuathan volcano erupt after so long lying dormant. Argento, ancient smith of the Aeon Lords, has been sure to keep it that way. A secret like the creation of homunculi should only be shared with worthy minds, and with the passing of Ossia's erstwhile creator, he can think of no one in the world who deserves it.

He has resurrected the poor thing, of course. Without a soul, returning a body to life is a simple thing. Frustratingly, her power over all six elements seems to have fled. But he has never known a setback he can't overcome.

Ossia's curiosity is as immense as her thirst for vengeance. He can make a weapon of her yet.
